name: Crush It!
author: Poki
description: Crush It! is an arcade game created by Sakkat Studio. Start your own juice factory where you need to crush fruits the old-fashioned way: Using your fists! Punch various types of fruits and treasure chests on the conveyor belt to make money. Avoid punching bombs, as they will cost you a life. The money you've earned can be spent on new types of fruits, and even on cool accessories for your hand. Go ahead and give it a play. You will go bananas over Crush It! How to play: Punch - Tap, Left mouse button, or the Space bar About the creator: Crush It! was created by Sakkat Studio. Play their other casual games on Poki: James Gun , Ground Digger , Sweet Run , and Throw It Higher!
